name: sparc-curation-tools

metadata.name: sparc-curation-tools
metadata.summary: A collection of tools to help with curating SPARC datasets.

documentation:
# SPARC Curation Tools

A collection of tools to help with curating SPARC datasets.

## Testing

Tests can be run with:

```
python -m unittest discover -s tests
```

# License


functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.plot_utilities.generate_dataframe_from_txt
documentation:
Generate a dataframe from a text file.

Args:

Returns:
    dataframe: The dataframe generated from the txt file.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.scaffold_annotations.setup_data
documentation:
Sets up the dataset by retrieving data from the on-disk files and initializing the manifest dataframe.

Args:
    dataset_dir (str): The directory path where the dataset will be set up.
    max_size (str): The maximum size that the dataset should occupy.

Returns:
    None

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.scaffold_annotations.get_confirmation_message
documentation:
"To fix this error, the 'additional types' of 'filename' in 'manifestFile' will be set to 'MIME'."
"To fix this error, a manifestFile will be created under manifestDir, and will insert the filename in this manifestFile with 'additional types' MIME."

"To fix this error, the data of filename in manifestFile will be deleted."
# TODO or NOT TODO: return different message based on input error type

modules.name: sparc.curation.tools.definitions
documentation: VERSION = sparc.curation.tools.__version__

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.plot_annotations.get_annotated_plot_dictionary
documentation:
Build and return a plot dictionary based on plot annotation in manifest files.
The annotated plot dictionary has the following structure:
{
    plot_file: [thumbnail_files]
}

Returns:
    dict: Plot dictionary.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.plot_annotations.get_confirmation_message
documentation:
"To fix this error, the 'additional types' of 'filename' in 'manifestFile' will be set to 'MIME'."
"To fix this error, a manifestFile will be created under manifestDir, and will insert the filename in this manifestFile with 'additional types' MIME."

"To fix this error, the data of filename in manifestFile will be deleted."

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.utilities.is_same_file
documentation:
Test if path1 is the same as path2.  If stat() on either fails and the paths
are non-empty test if the strings are the same.

classes.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame.setup_dataframe
documentation:
Set up the manifest data frame.

Args:
    dataset_dir (str): The directory containing the dataset.

Returns:
    ManifestDataFrame: The instance of the ManifestDataFrame class.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame._read_manifests
documentation:
Recursively read the manifest files in the dataset directory.

Args:
    depth (int): The current depth of recursive manifest reading.

Raises:
    BadManifestError: If a manifest sanitization error is found.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame.create_manifest
documentation:
Create a new manifest file.

Args:
    manifest_dir (str): The directory for the new manifest file.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame.check_directory_write_permission
documentation:
Checks the write permission for a given directory and raises an exception if it is not writable.

Args:
    directory_path (str): The directory path to check for write permission.

Raises:
    AnnotationDirectoryNoWriteAccess: If the specified directory is not writable.

Returns:
    None

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame._sanitise_column_heading
documentation:
Sanitize the column names related to 'derived from'.

Args:
    column_names (list): List of column names.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame._get_matching_dataframe
documentation: region -----Get-----

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame.get_matching_entry
documentation:
Get a list of entries from the specified column based on a matching condition.

Args:
    column_heading (str): The column to filter based on the 'value'.
    value: The value to match in the specified 'column_heading'.
    out_column_heading (str): The column from which to retrieve matching entries.

Returns:
    list: A list of matching entries from the 'out_column_heading' column.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame.get_entry_that_includes
documentation:
Get a list of entries from the specified column based on partial matching condition.

Args:
    column_heading (str): The column to search for partial matches.
    value (str): The value to search for within the specified 'column_heading'.
    out_column_heading (str): The column from which to retrieve matching entries.

Returns:
    list: A list of matching entries from the 'out_column_heading' column.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame.get_file_dataframe
documentation: Get file dataframe which match the file_location

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame.update_plot_annotation
documentation: endregion
region -----Update-----

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame.update_anatomical_entity
documentation:
Update the anatomical entity information in the manifest for a given file.

Args:
    file_location (str): The file location.
    annotation_data (str): The anatomical entity annotation data.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.manifest_helper.ManifestDataFrame.update_column_content
documentation:
Update the content of a specified column for a given file location.

Args:
    file_location (str): The file location.
    column_name (str): The name of the column to update.
    content (str): The content to update in the column.
    append (bool): Whether to append the content if the column already contains data.

Raises:
    FileNotFoundError: If the file is not found in the manifest.

A singleton class for managing manifest data frames.

This class provides methods to manipulate and access data in the manifest data frame.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.is_graphics_entry
documentation:
Check if the given entry in JSON format represents a graphics entry.

Args:
    entry (dict): The JSON entry to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if it's a graphics entry, False otherwise.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.is_view_entry
documentation:
Check if the given entry in JSON format represents a view entry.

Args:
    entry (dict): The JSON entry to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if it's a view entry, False otherwise.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.contains_metadata
documentation:
Check if the given JSON data contains metadata entries.

Args:
    json_data (str): The JSON data to test.

Returns:
    bool: True if it contains metadata, False otherwise.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.represents_view
documentation:
Check if the given JSON data represents a view.

Args:
    json_data (str): The JSON data to test.

Returns:
    bool: True if it represents a view, False otherwise.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.is_context_data_file
documentation:
Check if the given JSON data represents a context data file.

Args:
    json_data (str): The JSON data to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if it represents a context data file, False otherwise.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.is_annotation_csv_file
documentation:
Check if the given CSV reader represents an annotation CSV file.

Args:
    csv_reader (csv.reader): The CSV reader to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if it represents an annotation CSV file, False otherwise.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.is_json_of_type
documentation:
Check if the file at the given path is a JSON file of a specific type.

Args:
    file_path (str): The path to the file.
    max_size (int): The maximum allowed file size.
    test_func (function): The function to test the JSON data.

Returns:
    bool: True if it is a JSON file of the specified type, False otherwise.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.is_csv_of_type
documentation:
Check if the file at the given path is a CSV file of a specific type.

Args:
    file_path (str): The path to the file.
    max_size (int): The maximum allowed file size.
    test_func (function): The function to test the CSV data.

Returns:
    bool: True if it is a CSV file of the specified type, False otherwise.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.get_view_urls
documentation:
Get the view URLs from the metadata file.

Args:
    metadata_file (str): The path to the metadata file.

Returns:
    list: A list of view URLs.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.search_for_metadata_files
documentation:
Search for metadata files in the dataset directory.

Args:
    dataset_dir (str): The dataset directory path.
    max_size (int): The maximum allowed file size.

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple containing a list of metadata file paths and a dictionary mapping metadata file paths to view URLs.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.search_for_image_files
documentation:
Search for thumbnail files in the dataset directory that correspond to the given view files.

Args:
    dataset_dir (str): The dataset directory path.

Returns:
    list: A list of thumbnail file paths.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.filter_thumbnail_files_by_parent
documentation:
Filter a list of image file paths to include only those whose in the same folder
of any parent file in the given parent_files.

Args:
    image_file_paths (list): List of image file paths.
    parent_files (list): List of parent files paths.

Returns:
    list: Filtered list of image file paths.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.search_for_view_files
documentation:
Search for view files in the dataset directory.

Args:
    dataset_dir (str): The dataset directory path.
    max_size (int): The maximum allowed file size.

Returns:
    list: A list of view file paths.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.search_for_plot_files
documentation:
Search for plot files in the dataset directory.

Args:
    dataset_dir (str): The dataset directory path.

Returns:
    list: A list containing CSV and TSV plot file paths.

classes.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles.setup_dataset
documentation:
Set up the dataset by searching for the required files.

Args:
    dataset_dir (str): The dataset directory path.
    max_size (int): The maximum allowed file size.

Returns:
    OnDiskFiles: The instance of the class.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles.set_metadata_files
documentation:
Set the metadata files and metadata views.

Args:
    files (list): List of metadata file paths.
    metadata_views (dict): Dictionary containing metadata view file paths.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles.get_metadata_files
documentation:
Get the metadata file paths.

Returns:
    list: List of metadata file paths.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles.get_view_files
documentation:
Get the view file paths.

Returns:
    list: List of view file paths.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles.get_alt_forms_files
documentation:
Get the alternative forms file paths.

Returns:
    list: List of alternative forms file paths.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles.get_thumbnail_files
documentation:
Get the thumbnail file paths.

Returns:
    list: List of thumbnail file paths.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles.get_plot_files
documentation:
Get the plot file paths.

Returns:
    list: Lists of CSV and TSV plot file paths.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles.get_plot_thumbnails
documentation:
Get the plot thumbnail paths.

Returns:
    list: Lists of plot thumbnail paths.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.file_helper.OnDiskFiles.get_all_image_files
documentation:
Get all the image file paths.

Returns:
    list: List of all image file paths.

Singleton class for managing on-disk files.

This class provides methods for setting and retrieving metadata, view, thumbnail, alternative forms,
and plot files from a dataset directory. It also provides a method for setting up the
dataset by searching for the required files.

Attributes:
    _plot_files (dict): Dictionary containing lists of CSV and TSV plot file paths.
    _scaffold_files (dict): Dictionary containing lists of metadata, view, and thumbnail file paths.

functions.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.calculate_match
documentation:
Calculate the match rating between two items.

Args:
    item1 (str): First item.
    item2 (str): Second item.

Returns:
    int: Match rating.

documentation: Update the content of the on-disk and manifest files.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager.get_old_annotations
documentation:
Get errors for old annotations in the manifest dataframe.

    list: List of OldAnnotationError objects.
=== Find Errors ===

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager.get_missing_annotations
documentation:
Get errors for missing annotations in the manifest dataframe.

Returns:

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager.get_incorrect_annotations
documentation:
Get errors for incorrect annotations in the manifest dataframe.

Returns:
    list: List of IncorrectAnnotationError objects.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager._process_incorrect_derived_from
documentation:
Helper method to process incorrect derived from errors.

Args:
    on_disk_files (list): List of on-disk files.
    on_disk_parent_files (list): List of parent files on disk.
    manifest_files (list): List of files annotated in manifest data frame.
    incorrect_mime (str): Incorrect MIME type.

Returns:
    list: List of IncorrectDerivedFromError objects.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager.get_incorrect_derived_from
documentation:
Get errors for incorrect derived from relationships in the manifest dataframe.

Returns:
    list: List of IncorrectDerivedFromError objects.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager._process_incorrect_source_of
documentation:
Helper method to process incorrect source of errors.

Args:
    on_disk_files (list): List of on-disk files.
    mimetype (str): MIME type of source file type.
    on_disk_child_files (list): List of child files on disk.

Returns:
    list: List of IncorrectSourceOfError objects.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager.get_incorrect_source_of
documentation:
Get errors for incorrect source of relationships in the manifest dataframe.

Returns:
    list: List of IncorrectSourceOfError objects.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager.get_incorrect_complementary
documentation:
Get errors for incorrect complementary files in the manifest dataframe.

Returns:
    list: List of errors.

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager.update_derived_from
documentation:
Update the 'Derived From' column in the manifest data frame for the given file location.

Args:
    file_location (str): The file location to update.
    mime (str): The MIME type of the file.
    target (list): List of target file locations.
=== Fix Errors ===

methods.name: sparc.curation.tools.helpers.error_helper.ErrorManager.update_source_of
documentation:
Update the 'Source Of' column in the manifest data frame for the given file location.

Args:
    file_location (str): The file location to update.
    mime (str): The MIME type of the file.
    target (list): List of target file locations.
    replace (bool): True if the contents is to be replaced.

Class to check and manage the different or errors between the annotations in the manifest dataframe and
the actual files on disk.
